problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
hypothesis: If Lattice-based cryptography for quantum resistance is applied to —, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
